prompts.title: Young Man on Japanese Bicycle
prompts.prompt: A portrait of a young man with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. He is seated on a sleek modern Japanese bicycle while holding a contemporary iPhone. He is wearing a stylish gray and black Peshawari Kameez (Shalwar) with intricate detailing around the collar and cuffs. The background shows a vibrant Japanese urban street with soft daylight and subtle bokeh suggesting a bustling city environment. Realistic style with cinematic quality, sharp focus on the subject and slightly blurred background.

prompts.title: Man Hugging Goat in Winter
prompts.prompt: A heartwarming portrait of a young man with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. He gently hugs a small fluffy goat while a majestic German Shepherd dog curiously sniffs the goat with visible breath in the cold air. The scene is set in a serene winter landscape covered with fresh snow and falling snowflakes. Snow-covered evergreen trees and distant hills appear in the background. Soft diffused natural lighting, cinematic color grading, 85mm lens look with f/1.8 aperture creating beautiful bokeh. High dynamic range, film still quality, dramatic yet peaceful mood.

prompts.title: Boy Performing Tawaf Near Kaaba
prompts.prompt: Photorealistic 4:3 selfie of the subject from the reference photo, characterized by a fair, smooth complexion, deep-set dark almond-shaped eyes with a calm, neutral gaze, and a distinct, straight nasal bridge. The face has a soft, youthful jawline and natural pink-toned lips. The hair is dark, dense, and styled with short, textured bangs across the forehead. The subject is performing Tawaf in Masjid al-Haram in Mecca, standing very close to the Kaaba while wearing traditional white Ihram clothing with realistic fabric textures and natural folds. The iconic golden door of the Kaaba is visible behind the subject. The scene includes a diverse, natural crowd of pilgrims in white garments, creating an authentic spiritual atmosphere. Bright, natural midday sunlight, soft shadows on the polished white marble floor and the black Kiswah of the Kaaba, clear blue sky, highly detailed mosque architecture, cinematic lighting, and sharp focus on the subject's specific facial features.
